caption: A man with light-colored, styled hair wearing glasses, a white shirt, a bow tie, and suspenders is seated in a studio setting. He wears large black headphones over his ears and looks slightly to the side. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous small, framed photographs and some clothing items, including one with the text "LEE". A professional microphone on a stand is positioned in the foreground to his left. On the left side of the image, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST", and a similar "BOSS TALK 101" logo appears on the right. Across the sequence, the man remains relatively still in a seated position, with only subtle shifts in his posture and expression as he looks toward someone or something off-camera. The background, equipment, and on-screen text remain constant throughout the clip.
